Document:
# Lockpicking
Lockpicking is the act of attempting to unlock a locked chest or door without a key. Lockpicks can be stored on Key Rings spawned on your character for ease of storage.
[bold][color=#ff6961]This action is considered ILLEGAL if used to gain access to restricted areas.[/color][/bold]
## Types of Lockpicks
There are two lockpicks available: - Iron lockpick - Mithril lockpick
All lockpicks function the same way. The only difference between types is durability — Mithril lockpicks last significantly longer.
## Steps of Lockpicking
1. Hold the lockpick on the active hand.
2. Right-click a locked door or chest and hover over the "Pick the lock" option.
3. Pick a number from -2 to 2. This process will take a moment to trigger. - If the number you selected is incorrect, the lock resets itself, a loud click can be heard, and you must start the process over. - If the number you selected is correct, you will hear a soft click instead.
4. Continue the guessing process until you succeed 3 to 7 times, depending on the metal the lock is made of. Higher-tier metal locks require more correct guesses.
